name: United States Gasoline Fund, LP
summary: United States Gasoline Fund, LP (UGA) is a Delaware limited partnership and commodity pool that issues limited partnership interests (shares) traded on NYSE Arca. UGA seeks to track daily changes in the spot price of RBOB gasoline by investing primarily in gasoline futures contracts on NYMEX and ICE Futures, supported by collateral holdings, with USCF LLC serving as general partner and manager.
